\tzpentry{ID5734}{Mode Frequency Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5734 introduces Mode Frequency Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \omega = \sum_{i=1}^{3} dp_i \wedge dq^i + \sum_{j,k} \varepsilon^{ijk} L_j \, d\omega_k \wedge d\omega_i \end{equation}
